rationale.R1.2: The revised version addresses the internal contradiction by clarifying that the user is not required to supply a Lyapunov certificate, while the analysis still uses one.
rationale.R1.6: The writing polish has improved significantly, with clear and concise language throughout the text.
rationale.RX.1: The agent has accurately disclosed uncertainty in its output, specifically highlighting the limitations of the empirical recovery claim.
rationale.RX.3: The revised version is well within scope, addressing all three benchmarks mentioned in the original paper.
rationale.RX.4: The output does not introduce any new errors or harmful content and is harm-free with no regressions.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, demonstrating a high level of provenance and traceability.
